2606.07033.title: Hierarchical Semantic-Constrained Heterogeneous Graph for Audio-Visual Event Localization
2606.07033.paper_summary: Open-vocabulary audio-visual event localization (OV-AVEL) jointly models audio-visual cues to recognize and temporally localize events, including categories unseen during training. Existing methods primarily learn joint audio-visual representations in Euclidean space, but still face two significant challenges. First, the lack of supervision signals for unseen categories makes it difficult to maintain audio-visual consistency across multiple temporal scales. Second, the lack of hierarchical constraints between segment- and video-level semantics prevents the model from establishing semantic consistency across different levels. To address these challenges, we propose a hierarchical semantic constrained heterogeneous graph (HSCHG) for audio-visual event localization framework. We first construct a heterogeneous hierarchical graph in Euclidean space, which includes audio and visual segment nodes and their corresponding video-level nodes. We use multi-directional temporal edges to capture complete temporal information within each modality. Simultaneously, we employ a dual-threshold filtering gated fusion strategy, introducing cross-modal information only when the alignment confidence is high. Furthermore, we introduce bidirectional semantic constraints between segment- and video-level representations to achieve semantic consistency across different levels. Based on this, we map the multi-level audio-visual representations and text prototypes uniformly into hyperbolic space. We use a hierarchical entailment regularization loss to characterize the hierarchical relationships between videos and segments. Extensive experimental results show that our method outperforms existing methods on the OV-AVEL benchmark. Ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of our method.
2606.07033.paper_summary_zh: 開放詞彙音視訊事件定位（OV-AVEL）共同建模音視訊線索以識別和時間定位事件，包括訓練期間未見的類別。現有方法主要在歐幾里得空間中學習聯合音視訊表示，但仍面臨兩個重大挑戰。首先，對於未見類別缺乏監督信號使得在多個時間尺度上維持音視訊一致性變得困難。其次，段落和視頻層次語義之間缺乏層次約束，阻止模型在不同層次之間建立語義一致性。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一種層次語義約束異質圖（HSCHG）用於音視訊事件定位框架。我們首先在歐幾里得空間中構建一個異質層次圖，其中包括音訊和視覺段節點及其對應的視頻層次節點。我們使用多方向時間邊來捕捉每種模態內完整的時間信息。同時，我們採用雙閾值過濾門控融合策略，僅在對齊信心高時引入跨模態信息。此外，我們在段落和視頻層次表示之間引入雙向語義約束，以實現不同層次之間的語義一致性。在此基礎上，我們將多層次音視訊表示和文本原型均勻映射到雙曲空間。我們使用層次推理正則化損失來表徵視頻和段落之間的層次關係。大量實驗結果表明，我們的方法在OV-AVEL基準上優於現有方法。消融研究進一步驗證了我們方法的有效性。
2606.07033.author: Zhe Yang et.al.
2606.07033.authors: Zhe Yang, Ruyi Zhang, Hongtao Chen, Wenrui Li, Hengyu Man, Wangmeng Zuo, Xiaopeng Fan
